text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What's happening here?! It's as if a volcano is
erupting inside me and bringing forth a fiery
energy!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
O Three Goddesses... Were you the ones who
bestowed this power unto me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whether it was you or not, I won't let this power
go to waste! Watch as I put your gracious gift to
good use!
